Skip to main content

Proprietary systems for ambitious technical partners.

PROPRIETARY SYSTEMS

Reusable software for ambitious technical partners.

Programs retain technical knowledge that should survive beyond a single commission. They package recurring architecture, production and research questions into systems that can be reviewed, piloted, integrated or licensed with a clearly stated level of maturity.

VASTE: a runtime for graph-based products.

VASTE provides shared logic for durable identity, relationships, context, permissions and modular execution. It supports knowledge and product platforms that need to remain coherent as data, users and interfaces expand.

FORGE and ORETH: production and signal research.

FORGE investigates repeatable pipelines for generating, transforming and refining digital artefacts. ORETH explores audio analysis, event detection and adaptive learning for sonic systems and cultural research.

A lightweight framework for public surfaces.

The Electronic Artefacts lightweight framework turns the studio’s static, semantic and performance practices into a transferable starting point for teams that need a durable public website without a heavy stack.

Access begins with evidence, not promises.

Potential partners can request a repository walkthrough, focused technical review or bounded pilot. Architecture, constraints, deliverables and ownership are clarified before a wider implementation or licensing discussion.
